misc_summary: This file contains legitimate miscellaneous content including: front matter with LDS garment advertisements, Royal Bread and Columbia Grafonola ads, table of contents for May 1921 issue, advertisers' directory, General Board member listings with Mrs. Clarissa Smith Williams as President and other board members, and various Salt Lake City business advertisements. There is also a partial photo caption mentioning 'MRS. C. BYRON WHITNEY AND CHILDREN' but this appears to be just a caption fragment, not article content. All content is appropriately classified as miscellaneous rather than standalone articles.
